content: عَلى اِلعُموم اِلجَوّ بَرد فَاخُد چَكِّتّ
translations: eng:anyway the weather is cold, so take a jacket

transcriptions.arabizi: Aala ilAumoom ilgaww bardafa chud jakkitt
